name: Orange Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease 12 muffin cups or line with paper liners; set aside.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the dry ingredients including orange peel.
4. Beat egg, then add orange juice, melted butter, milk, and vanilla. Mix until just combined.
5. Spoon batter into prepared cups, filling each cup about half full.
6. Bake for 18-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Allow to cool in the pan on a wire rack for 5 minutes.
8. Remove from the pan and serve warm or at room temperature.
